briefdescription.para: Object moves outside of the screen.
Object moves out through the top(or left) side of the screen. Maps to: ATSPI_MOVE_OUTED_TOP_LEFT.
Object moves out through the bottom(or right) side of the screen. Maps to: ATSPI_MOVE_OUTED_BOTTOM_RIGHT.
Object moves into the screen or moves inside the screen.
Enumeration describing type of object move relative to the screen. Only outgoing moves are signalled to AT-clients.
Enumeration describing a relation between accessible objects 1 to 0..N relation model is supported. By default relation is not symmetrical. Symmetry must be explicitly maintained.
Enumeration describing if coordinates are relative to screen or window.
Enumeration indicating relative stacking order ComponentLayer allows to describe visibility of all parts of UI basing on the concrete stacking order.
Enumeration describing role of the Accessibility object Object can be described by only one role.
Enumeration describing states of the Accessibility object Object can be in many states at the same time.
Enumeration describing change of text object.
Enumeration describing change of object property.
Enumeration describing change of window object.
Enumeration used to acquire bounded text from accessible object having textual content.
Enumeration indicating current state of gesture.
Resolves to the native C++ type that represents the given AT-SPI interface.

detaileddescription.para: For example, AtspiInterfaceType<AtspiInterface::ACCESSIBLE> is the same as Dali::Accessibility::Accessible . Not all AT-SPI interfaces have native C++ representations (in which case, such an expression will not compile).

parameterdescription.para: Enumeration value indicating the requested AT-SPI interface.

briefdescription.para: Checks if ATSPI is activated or not.
